AdCampaign.title: AdCampaign
AdCampaign.description: Represents an advertising campaign created by a member.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ad campaign.

creatorMemberId.description: The UID of the TGN Member who created the campaign.

creatorName.description: Denormalized name of the creator for display.

creatorAvatarUrl.description: Denormalized avatar URL of the creator for display.

name.description: The name of the ad campaign.

status.description: The current status of the campaign.

budget.description: The total budget for the campaign.

amountSpent.description: The amount of the budget that has been spent.

headline.description: The main headline for the ad creative.

bodyText.description: The body text content for the ad creative.

imageUrl.description: URL of the primary ad image.

callToActionText.description: The text for the call-to-action button.

callToActionUrl.description: The destination URL for the ad.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the campaign was created.

rejectionReason.description: Reason for rejection if status is 'rejected'.

adSize.description: The size format of the ad.

TGNMember.title: TGNMember
TGNMember.description: Represents a member of the Transcend Global Network.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TGN Member (matches Firebase Auth UID).

sectorPreferences.description: Array of sector names the member has preferences for (up to 3).

role.description: The member's role within the network.

purpose.description: A description of the member's purpose for joining the network (a short bio).

identityProfile.description: A JSON string containing the member's self-identified goals and interests.

avatarUrl.description: URL to an image for the user's avatar.

isVerifiedMentor.description: Indicates if the member has passed KYC and is a verified mentor.

planName.description: Name of the subscription plan (e.g., 'Pro Member').

renewsAt.description: Timestamp when the subscription is due for renewal.

connections.description: Array of member UIDs that this member is connected with.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the member account was created.

MentorKYC.title: MentorKYC
MentorKYC.description: Stores the Know Your Customer (KYC) information for mentor verification.

memberId.description: The UID of the member this KYC submission belongs to.

status.description: The current status of the KYC verification.

certificateUrl.description: URL to the uploaded professional certificate.

avatarUrl.description: URL to the user's avatar photo for verification.

faceScanFrontUrl.description: URL to the captured front-facing facial scan image.

faceScanLeftUrl.description: URL to the captured left-facing facial scan image.

faceScanRightUrl.description: URL to the captured right-facing facial scan image.

submittedAt.description: Timestamp when the KYC form was submitted.

reviewedAt.description: Timestamp when the submission was reviewed by an admin.

Program.title: Program
Program.description: Represents a mentorship or learning program.

format.description: The learning format of the program.

mentor.description: The name of the primary mentor for this program.

enrolled.description: Number of members enrolled in the program.

rating.description: Average user rating for the program (1-5).

duration.description: Estimated duration of the program (e.g., '4 weeks').

imageId.description: Reference to an image in placeholder-images.json.

certified.description: Indicates if the program offers a certification upon completion.

googleMeetUrl.description: URL for the Google Meet live session.

preRecordedVideoUrl.description: URL of the pre-recorded video for the program.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the program was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the program was last updated.

deactivatedAt.description: Timestamp when the program was deactivated.

EnrolledProgram.title: Enrolled Program
EnrolledProgram.description: Represents a program a member is enrolled in.

progress.description: The member's progress in the program (0-100).

AffiliateReferral.title: AffiliateReferral
AffiliateReferral.description: Represents a referral in the affiliate income system.

referrerMemberId.description: Reference to the TGN Member who made the referral. (Relationship: TGNMember 1:N AffiliateReferral)

referredMemberId.description: Reference to the TGN Member who was referred. (Relationship: TGNMember 1:N AffiliateReferral)

commissionPercentage.description: The commission percentage for this referral (capped at 15%).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the referral was created.

Commission.title: Commission
Commission.description: Represents a commission earned from a referral's purchase.

referrerId.description: The UID of the member who earned the commission.

buyerId.description: The UID of the member who made the purchase.

productId.description: The ID of the product that was purchased.

programId.description: The ID of the program that was purchased.

saleAmount.description: The total amount of the sale.

MentorCertification.title: MentorCertification
MentorCertification.description: Represents the certification status and progress for a TGN member.

memberId.description: The UID of the member this certification belongs to. This should match the document ID.

paidProgramsCompleted.description: Number of paid programs the member has completed.

accountAgeInMonths.description: The member's account age in months.

menteeBadgeLevel.description: The member's current Mentee Badge level.

curriculumCompleted.description: Whether the member has completed the certification curriculum.

evaluationPassed.description: Whether the member has passed the TGN evaluation.

isCertified.description: Overall status indicating if the member is a TGN Certified Mentor.

certificationDate.description: The date the certification was awarded.

Wallet.title: Wallet
Wallet.description: Represents a member's digital wallet for multi-currency transactions.

memberId.description: The UID of the TGN Member who owns the wallet. This should match the document ID.

currency.description: The main currency of the wallet (e.g., USD, EUR).

balance.description: The current balance in the wallet's currency.

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Represents a single transaction in a member's wallet.

description.description: A brief description of the transaction.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the transaction was created.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a product sold on the e-commerce marketplace.

sellerMemberId.description: Reference to the TGN Member selling the product. (Relationship: TGNMember 1:N Product)

sellerName.description: Denormalized name of the seller for display purposes.

sellerAvatarUrl.description: Denormalized avatar URL of the seller for display purposes.

imageUrl.description: URL of the primary product image.

approvalStatus.description: Status of the product approval workflow.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was created.

Event.title: Event
Event.description: Represents an event or congress organized within the TGN.

startDate.description: Start date and time of the event.

endDate.description: End date and time of the event.

imageUrl.description: URL of the primary event image.

googleMeetUrl.description: URL for the Google Meet live session if virtual/hybrid.

deactivatedAt.description: Timestamp when the event was deactivated (soft delete).

MatchmakingRecommendation.title: MatchmakingRecommendation
MatchmakingRecommendation.description: Represents a matchmaking recommendation for a member.

memberId.description: Reference to the TGN Member receiving the recommendation. (Relationship: TGNMember 1:N MatchmakingRecommendation)

recommendedType.description: The type of item being recommended (Mentor, Program, Sector).

recommendedId.description: The ID of the recommended item (reference to Mentor, Program, or Sector).

explanation.description: Explanation for why this recommendation was made (generated by GenAI).

Cause.title: Cause
Cause.description: Represents a fundraising cause or campaign created by a member.

creatorMemberId.description: The UID of the TGN Member who created the cause.

creatorName.description: Denormalized name of the creator for display purposes.

creatorAvatarUrl.description: Denormalized avatar URL of the creator for display purposes.

title.description: The title of the fundraising cause.

description.description: A detailed description of the cause.

backersCount.description: The number of people who have contributed to the cause.

status.description: The approval status of the cause.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the cause was created.

Post.title: Post
Post.description: Represents a post in the community feed.

authorId.description: The UID of the TGN Member who created the post.

authorName.description: Denormalized name of the author for display.

authorAvatarUrl.description: Denormalized avatar URL of the author for display.

content.description: The text content of the post.

imageUrls.description: Array of image URLs from Firebase Storage.

Comment.title: Comment
Comment.description: Represents a comment on a post.

authorId.description: The UID of the TGN Member who wrote the comment.

authorName.description: Denormalized name of the author for display.

authorAvatarUrl.description: Denormalized avatar URL of the author for display.

content.description: The text content of the comment.

Chat.title: Chat
Chat.description: Represents a private chat session between two or more members.

members.description: Array of member UIDs who are part of the chat.

typing.description: Indicates which users are currently typing. Keys are user UIDs, values are booleans.

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: Represents a single message within a chat.

senderId.description: UID of the member who sent the message.

type.description: The type of the message content.

content.description: The text content of the message.

mediaUrl.description: URL to the uploaded media file for image, video, or document types.

fileName.description: The original name of the uploaded file.

fileSize.description: The size of the uploaded file in bytes.

FriendRequest.title: FriendRequest
FriendRequest.description: Represents a connection request between two members.

id.description: Unique identifier for the friend request.

senderId.description: The UID of the member who sent the request.

recipientId.description: The UID of the member receiving the request.

status.description: The current status of the request.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the request was sent.

collections.description: Stores TGN Member profiles. Path-based ownership for private user data. Includes user's core information and role. The 'userId' param matches the Firebase Auth UID.
Stores KYC data for mentor verification. Document ID is the user's UID. Writable by the user, readable only by admins.
Stores information about mentorship sectors. Accessible to all members for reference.
Stores all available learning and mentorship programs. Publicly readable.
Stores programs a member is enrolled in. The document ID should be the program ID. Owned by the user.
Stores affiliate referral data. Security rules will control access based on referrer and referred member IDs.
Stores commission records earned from affiliate referrals. Writable by the buyer, readable by the referrer.
Stores mentor certification data, where the document ID is the user's UID. Access controlled via security rules to allow reads by the owner and writes by admins.
Stores wallet information for each member, where the document ID is the user's UID. Owned by member, with admin access for financial oversight.
Stores product information for the e-commerce marketplace. Access controlled by sellerMemberId and admin roles. Includes 'sellerMemberId' for authorization independence.
Stores event information. Publicly accessible, but with admin controls for creation and modification.
Stores matchmaking recommendations for members. Accessible to the member to whom the recommendation is made, as indicated by 'memberId'.
Stores matchmaking recommendations for members. Nested under user to clearly show ownership and for easier access to recommendations specific to a user.
Stores a user's wallet transactions. Owned by the user, writes are system-only.
Stores fundraising causes created by members. Requires admin approval before becoming publicly visible.
Stores all community feed posts. Readable by all authenticated members.
Stores comments for a specific post. Readable by all authenticated members.
Stores all advertising campaigns. Requires admin approval before going live. Writable by creator, manageable by admin.
Stores metadata for private chat sessions between members. Access is controlled by the 'members' array.
Stores all messages for a specific chat session.
Stores all member connection requests. Access is controlled by senderId and recipientId.
